code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> Opened: Issue created
    
    Opened --> Triage: Auto-added to project
    
    Triage --> Todo: Accepted & prioritized
    Triage --> Closed: Rejected / Duplicate
    Triage --> NeedsInfo: More information needed
    
    NeedsInfo --> Triage: Information provided
    NeedsInfo --> Closed: No response
    
    Todo --> InProgress: Work started
    
    InProgress --> InReview: PR opened
    InProgress --> Blocked: Dependencies / Issues
    InProgress --> Todo: Paused / Deprioritized
    
    Blocked --> InProgress: Unblocked
    Blocked --> Todo: Alternative approach
    
    InReview --> InProgress: Changes requested
    InReview --> Done: PR merged
    
    Done --> [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]: Issue closed
    Closed --> [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]
    
    note right of Opened
        Labels applied:
        - Type (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)
        - Area (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)
    end note
    
    note right of Triage
        Platform/Owner reviews:
        - Is it valid?
        - What's the priority?
        - Who should work on it?
    end note
    
    note right of Todo
        Work is planned:
        - Priority: P0-P3
        - Effort: XS-XL
        - Owner Team assigned
    end note
    
    note right of InProgress
        Active development:
        - Branch created
        - Commits happening
        - Regular updates
    end note
    
    note right of InReview
        PR review:
        - CODEOWNERS review
        - CI checks passing
        - Approvals required
    end note
    
    note right of Done
        Completed:
        - PR merged
        - Changes deployed
        - Issue auto-closed
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech的问题生命周期画一个状态图，从PatientRecords创建issue开始，一直到DiagnosticEngine完成诊断闭环。关键状态包括Opened、Triage、Todo、InProgress、InReview、Done，还有Closed和Blocked这些异常分支。
明白了，起点是PatientRecords，终点有两个分支——Done到DiagnosticEngine，Closed到HIPAA_Vault。我注意到Triage状态有多个出口，除了Accepted到Todo，还有Rejected直接Closed，以及NeedsInfo这个中间状态？
对，NeedsInfo很关键。当信息不足时，issue会挂起等待补充，补充后回到Triage重新评估；如果一直无响应，就关闭到Closed。另外InProgress也有回退到Todo的情况，比如工作暂停或优先级降低。
好的，我已经把主流程和分支都画出来了。Blocked状态我设计了两种出口：问题解决后回到InProgress，或者换方案回Todo。InReview到InProgress是changes requested的情况。
每个状态需要加上右侧注释说明具体活动。Opened要标注Labels applied，包括Type用EMR_Sync、Area用HIPAA_Vault。Triage是平台负责人评审validity、priority和owner。
收到，Todo的注释我写了work planned，包含P0-P3优先级、XS-XL effort估算、owner team分配。InProgress是active development，包括branch创建、commits、regular updates。
InReview的注释要强调CODEOWNERS review、CI checks passing、approvals required。Done则是PR merged、changes deployed、issue auto-closed。这些合规检查对HIPAA场景很重要。
全部完成了。状态流转和注释都已对齐，从PatientRecords创建issue，经过完整生命周期，正常结束到DiagnosticEngine，异常关闭到HIPAA_Vault归档，符合医疗数据合规要求。
